CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a_03" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b_03" water="0.402"/>'));
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getNumVal() AS EMPNO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getNumVal() AS EMPNO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AND e.I < 3;
SELECT MIN(e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getNumVal()) AS MinEmpNo FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');
SELECT AVG(e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getNumVal()) AS AvgEmpNo FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');

SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getNumVal() AS EMPNO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') UNION SELECT e2.XMLVAL.extract('//pono').getNumVal() AS PONO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e2 WHERE e2.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/pono');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getNumVal() AS EMPNO FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/team/member/empno') AND e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/empno');
CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS_2 (ID integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//deptid').getNumVal() AS DEPTID FROM TEST_XMLS_2 AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/department/deptid');
